scripts.test:notify: npx playwright test --project=chromium && npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && npx ts-node -r dotenv/config scripts/notify-slack.ts
scripts.test:full: npx playwright test && npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && npx ts-node scripts/notify-slack.ts
scripts.test:sepa-eur: rm -rf allure-results && npx playwright test tests/ui/specs/sepa-eur-validation.spec.ts --project=chromium --workers=3 && npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && npx ts-node -r dotenv/config scripts/notify-slack.ts
